title: pelargonium × aquilinum
intro: Pelargonium × aquilinum, also known as Cape Chamomile or Blue Spotted Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus, native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds like linalool and geraniol, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × aquilinum include soothing digestive issues, reducing stress and anxiety, and providing relief from insomnia, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × aquilinum include tea, infusions, and essential oil, which can be used in aromatherapy, skincare products, and as a natural remedy for various health concerns.
